headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Monday?
summary: Looking for the S&P500 stocks that are experiencing notable gaps on Monday? Find out which stocks are gapping up and gapping down in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: BHP Hikes Jansen Stage 2 Project Investment After Detailed Review
summary: BHP Group raises Jansen Stage 2 investment to $6.9B after a detailed review, with first production expected in late FY31.

raw.summary: BHP Group raises Jansen Stage 2 investment to $6.9B after a detailed review, with first production expected in late FY31.

headline: Eastman Expands Portfolio With Jarylec Dielectric Fluids Buyout
summary: EMN expands in dielectric fluids with Jarylec acquisition, adding assets from Arkema and strengthening its power grid applications portfolio.

raw.headline: Eastman Expands Portfolio With Jarylec Dielectric Fluids Buyout

headline: ArcelorMittal and AWS Advance AI in Lower-Carbon Construction
summary: MT teams up with AWS to bring AI and cloud tools to steelmaking and supply lower-carbon steel under a multi-year deal.
